title: Add openSUSE Kubic to install.md
body: Kubic's default container runtime is podman, so users shouldn't need to read the install.md, but if they do, now they can know they don't need to do anything :)

I understand the following commands:
- `bot, add author to whitelist`
- `bot, test pull request`

LGTM once the signoff is completed.
Added the signoff, thanks for the nice quick reviews :)
